form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after two months 12th of 16 at Saint-Cloud on March 29 over 2000m, slow going 11 len behind Drumard carrying 57.5kg at $9.70. Previously second-up won by a neck at Landivisiau September 21 over 2150m on a rain affected track defeating Le Sage with 61kg. Will come on from that run and is one of the leading chances.

form.formComment: Resuming after a 12 weeks break. Not seen since he finished last of 16 at Deauville All Weather January 16 over 2500m, 41 len behind Barbate carrying 54.5kg at $64. On debut won by 1.75 len La Roche-Posay September 14 over 2400m slow track defeating Queen D'aunou carrying 61kg. May need more time.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming second last of 13 at Toulouse on March 1 over 1600m, 33 len behind Sir Crater with 57.5kg at $14. Second-up won by 7 len at Limoges March 15 over 2100m defeating Rue Ernestine carrying 56kg. Needs to go to another level to match these.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign fourth of 15 at Deauville All Weather January 23 over 1900m, 1.75 len behind Saturday Night carrying 58kg at $15. Previously first up; third of 14 at Deauville All Weather December 12 over 1900m, 4.5 len behind Monbe with 56kg at $15. Expect a bold showing.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Previously first up; third of 14 at Deauville All Weather December 12 over 1900m, 4.5 len behind Monbe with 56kg at $15. Expect a bold showing.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last outing won by 4 len at Le Mans March 20 over 1950m on a soft track defeating Golden Disc with 56.5kg at $6. At only start last preparation 6th of 12 at Landivisiau on September 21 over 2150m, slow going 12 len behind Miss Calvados carrying 56.5kg. Looks a definite top-three chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Having second run back today. Last outing won by 4 len at Le Mans March 20 over 1950m on a soft track defeating Golden Disc with 56.5kg at $6. At only start last preparation 6th of 12 at Landivisiau on September 21 over 2150m, slow going 12 len behind Miss Calvados carrying 56.5kg. Looks a definite top-three chance.

form.formComment: Most recently 2nd of 15 at Le Mans on March 20 over 1950m, slow going nose behind Alkidan carrying 56kg at $8.40. The race before that eased back early on 11th of 15 at Deauville All Weather on February 6 over 2500m, 12 len behind Cosmic Front carrying 56.5kg at $7.80. Going well and is one of the leading chances.

form.formComment: Returns from a 33-day let-up. Last start second last of 11 at Fontainebleau on March 6 over 3000m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Auteur with 57kg at $14. Before that ran on from midfield and won by 0.8 len at Pornichet February 18 over 3100m defeating Keen Lady carrying 55.5kg at $5.70. Shapes up nicely.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 6th of 8 at Lyon-la-Soie on February 24 over 2150m, 5 len behind Starac carrying 56kg at $20. Second run from a spell 7th of 9 at Fontainebleau on March 17 over 2200m, slow going 4.5 len behind Cassius with 56kg at $69. Struggling to find form and has the job ahead.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months raced on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 10 at Saint-Cloud on March 19 over 2000m, slow going 24 len behind Clicclic Panpanpan with 60kg at $13. Previously second-up came from midfield; 3rd of 10 at Vichy on August 20 over 2400m, on a slow track; 0.6 len behind Pink Monday with 59kg at $6.70. Will benefit from that run and can feature in the finish.

form.formComment: Resuming after a 11 weeks break. Finished off last preparation second last of 11 at Pau All Weather January 20 over 2400m, 8 len behind Planckeinstein carrying 52.5kg at $15. On debut sixth of 15 at Fontainebleau March 1 2025 over 2200m, soft track; 5 len behind Espoir Avenir carrying 56kg at $80. Will need to go to a new level to feature.
